Workflow.name: Ascension-Workflow-Persona-Rehire-Process

Variable.name: event
Variable.Description: The IdentityChangeEvent. It can be used to build the provisioning plan, but does not need to bepersisted with the case, so marked as transient.

Variable.name: trace
Variable.Description: Used for debugging this workflow and when set to true trace will be sent to stdout.

Variable.name: flow
Variable.Description: The name of the LCM flow that launched this workflow.

Variable.name: source
Variable.Description: String version of sailpoint.object.Source to indicate where the request originated. Defaults to LCE.

Variable.name: identityDisplayName
Variable.Description: The displayName of the identity being updated. Query for this using a projection query and fall back to the name.

Variable.name: requestType
Variable.Description: The Decider determining the Use Case

Workflow.Description: This is the Workflow for Rehire - Persona Process

Transition.to: User Type or Employee class Change Flow

Step.name: User Type or Employee class Change Flow

Transition.to: User Type or Employee class Change Flow
